site.name: FastTool
site.title: Free online image conversion - Complete collection of PDF conversion Tools - FastTool
site.description: FastTool offers free online tools such as image compression, format conversion, PDF compression, and PDF to Word conversion. No registration is required and local processing is safer.

home.heroSubtitle: Compress, convert and resize images instantly.
home.seoText: FastTool helps creators optimize images in the browser with no sign-up and no server upload. It is fast, private and SEO-friendly for discoverability.
home.faqQ1: Are my images uploaded to your server?
home.faqA1: No. Processing is done in your browser whenever possible.
home.faqQ2: Can I use it on mobile?
home.faqA2: Yes, all tools are responsive and mobile-friendly.
home.faqA3: Yes, core tools are free to use.

tool.uploadHint: Drag and drop an image here, or click to choose.
tool.noResult: No output yet. Upload an image and start processing.
